ellipse.style: animation:pulse2 4s ease-in-out infinite;stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.0831293;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation:pulse1 6s ease-in-out infinite 1s;stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.270526;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation:pulse1 5s ease-in-out infinite 2s;stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.495472;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

path.style: animation:flow1 3s linear infinite;fill:none;stroke:rgb(56, 189, 248);color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1.5px;stroke-dasharray:6px, 3px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.7;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation:flow2 2.5s linear infinite;fill:none;stroke:rgb(56, 189, 248);color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1.5px;stroke-dasharray:6px, 3px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.7;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation:flow1 4s linear infinite 0.5s;fill:none;stroke:rgb(14, 165, 233);color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-dasharray:4px, 4px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.5;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation:flow2 3.5s linear infinite 1s;fill:none;stroke:rgb(14, 165, 233);color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-dasharray:4px, 4px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.5;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
